meta.description: Niman Disciple specialization (Mystic career). 30 talent cards: 10 Tier 1, 8 Tier 2, 6 Tier 3, 4 Tier 4, 2 Tier 5. Players draft 15 into a pyramid (5/4/3/2/1).

specialization.name: Niman Disciple
specialization.description: A practitioner of Form VI lightsaber combat, blending Force powers with balanced swordplay. The Niman Disciple uses Willpower to fuel attacks and draws enemies close with the Force, creating a versatile melee-Force hybrid.

talents.name: Grit
talents.description: Increase Strain Threshold by 1 per rank.

talents.name: Toughened
talents.description: Increase Wound Threshold by 2 per rank.

talents.name: Parry
talents.description: When hit by a melee attack, suffer 3 strain to reduce damage by 2 + ranks in Parry.

talents.name: Niman Technique
talents.description: When making a Melee combat check, use Willpower instead of Brawn for the attack.

talents.name: Second Wind
talents.description: Once per encounter, recover strain equal to ranks in Second Wind.

talents.name: Quick Draw
talents.description: Once per round, draw or holster a weapon as an incidental instead of a maneuver.

talents.name: Conditioned
talents.description: Remove 1 Setback die per rank from Athletics and Coordination checks.

talents.name: Resolve
talents.description: Remove 1 Setback die per rank from Discipline and Cool checks.

talents.name: Durable
talents.description: Subtract 10 per rank from critical injury rolls against you (minimum 1).

talents.name: Force Sensitivity
talents.description: Add 1 Boost die to Discipline checks to resist Fear and Force-based attacks.

talents.name: Center of Being
talents.description: Once per round, as a maneuver, attacks against you cannot benefit from Advantage or Triumph for triggering weapon qualities until the start of your next turn. Costs 1 strain per rank used.

talents.name: Feral Strength
talents.description: Add 1 damage to one Brawl or Melee attack per round.

talents.name: Bought Time
talents.description: On your turn, suffer 2 strain to perform an additional maneuver.

talents.name: Enduring
talents.description: Increase Soak by 1 per rank.

talents.name: Lethal Blows
talents.description: Add +10 per rank to critical injury rolls inflicted on opponents.

talents.name: Defensive Training
talents.description: Once per round, as a maneuver, upgrade the difficulty of all melee attacks targeting you by 1 per rank until the start of your next turn.

talents.name: Draw Closer
talents.description: Make a Melee combat check. If successful, may also move the target one range band closer before dealing damage.

talents.name: Sense Danger
talents.description: Remove 1 Setback die from all Perception and Vigilance checks.

talents.name: Force Assault
talents.description: After a successful Melee attack, spend 2 Advantage to deal additional damage equal to Willpower to the target.

talents.name: Heroic Resilience
talents.description: Once per session, when you would be incapacitated by wounds, make a Hard Resilience check. On success, remain conscious with 1 wound remaining.

talents.name: Crippling Blow
talents.description: Increase the difficulty of your next combat check by 1. If you deal a critical, add +10 to the roll.

talents.name: Armor Master
talents.description: When wearing armor, increase total Soak by 1.

talents.name: True Aim
talents.description: Once per round, use a maneuver to gain +1 Boost die per rank on your next ranged attack this turn.

talents.name: Last One Standing
talents.description: Add 1 Boost die to combat checks for each ally that has been incapacitated this encounter.

talents.name: Deadly Accuracy
talents.description: When making a melee attack, add ranks in the weapon's skill as bonus damage to one hit.

talents.name: Unstoppable
talents.description: Once per session, perform a bonus action during your turn. Suffer 4 strain.

talents.name: Improved Center of Being
talents.description: When using Center of Being, also reduce damage from melee attacks by 1.

talents.name: Iron Body
talents.description: Reduce strain suffered from voluntary maneuvers and actions by 1 per rank (minimum 1).

talents.name: Dedication (Willpower)
talents.description: Permanently increase Willpower by 1.

talents.name: Dedication (Presence)
talents.description: Permanently increase Presence by 1.
